channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
channel.description: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: 6 months into his stay in jail, Denis was found dead in his jail cell.
item.description: A factual overview of the case in which Denis was found dead in his jail cell six months into his sentence, examining the timeline, official findings, and the response from authorities.

media:content.media:title: 6 months into his stay in jail, Denis was found dead in his jail cell.
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the case in which Denis was found dead in his jail cell six months into his sentence, examining the timeline, official findings, and the response from authorities.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: How does someone do this to an 8 year old little girl?
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving harm to an 8-year-old girl, outlining the investigation, charges, and court proceedings in a respectful and non‑sensational manner.

media:content.media:title: How does someone do this to an 8 year old little girl?
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving harm to an 8-year-old girl, outlining the investigation, charges, and court proceedings in a respectful and non‑sensational manner.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Woman Was Caught on Video Disposing Her Friend’s Body
item.description: A factual overview of a case in which a woman was recorded disposing of her friend’s body, covering the investigation, legal proceedings, and verified details without sensationalizing the events.

media:content.media:title: Woman Was Caught on Video Disposing Her Friend’s Body
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a case in which a woman was recorded disposing of her friend’s body, covering the investigation, legal proceedings, and verified details without sensationalizing the events.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Samantha Sperry: Secrets, Bunkers, and Unanswered Questions
item.description: A factual overview of the Samantha Sperry case, exploring hidden details, mysterious bunkers, and the unanswered questions that continue to intrigue investigators and the public.

media:content.media:title: Samantha Sperry: Secrets, Bunkers, and Unanswered Questions
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the Samantha Sperry case, exploring hidden details, mysterious bunkers, and the unanswered questions that continue to intrigue investigators and the public.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
